title: claytonia rubra
intro: Claytonia rubra, also known as Red Miner's Lettuce or Red Wood Sorrel, is a perennial plant species that belongs to the purslane family (Portulacaceae). It is native to the Pacific coast of North America and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting eye health. Claytonia rubra can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is also used as an ingredient in salads and other culinary dishes.
